listings.title: Irongear Humbucker PAF style Pickup Set
listings.body: For sale is a never used, never opened set of IronGear Rolling Mill Humbuckers. Neck pickup and Bridge pickup. These are from a UK company.  I was going to put these in a Telecaster Deluxe which I never got around to and plans changed. From the clips I've heard, these sound fantastic. They are similar to Dimarzio Super Distortion pickups. These would normally go for around $100.00. Asking for $80.00 for the pair, firm. You can hear sound clips here: https://www.irongear.co.uk/irongear_pickups_011.htm

listings.title: Rockwell Delta Table Saw Extensions (Wings) -pair
listings.body: A pair of Old Delta Rockwell table extensions for the Homecraft models. They measure 22-inches in depth and 5-inches wide. They fit a variety of 8", 9" and 10" models of the Rockwell Delta table saws from the 1940's and 50's. Solid cast iron. Price is for the pair.
